title: Order creation from cart (atomic transaction)
description: Order + orderItems + payment record created atomically in a single DB transaction on checkout completion, with an idempotency key to prevent duplicate orders from double form-submits.

inScope: Order creation from cart contents in a single DB transaction (order + orderItems + payment record)
Idempotency key to prevent duplicate orders from double form-submits
outOfScope: Order editing after creation (handled by status-update feature)

acceptanceCriteria.text: Completing checkout creates exactly one order with its items and payment record, even under a double-submit
Order numbers follow the ORD-YYYYMMDD-XXXX format
A failed transaction leaves no partial order/items/payment rows behind
